page_metadata.biotools__summary: Method for evaluating/predicting effects of single amino acid substitutions on protein function. Each prediction is associated with a reliability index that correlates with accuracy and thereby enables experimentalists to zoom into the most promising predictions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Method for evaluating/predicting effects of single amino acid substitutions on protein function. Each prediction is associated with a reliability index that correlates with accuracy and thereby enables experimentalists to zoom into the most promising predictions.
